{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/8922182?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/srikanthramu/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/srikanthramu/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/srikanthramu/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/srikanthramu/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/srikanthramu", "id": 8922182, "login": "srikanthramu", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg5MjIxODI=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/srikanthramu/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/srikanthramu/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/srikanthramu/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/srikanthramu/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/srikanthramu/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/srikanthramu", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45609", "cvss": {"score": 7.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "### Summary

The mcp-security framework fails to implement the mandatory SSRF mitigations outlined in the Model Context Protocol (MCP) [security specifications](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/docs/tutorials/security/security_best_practices#mitigation-3). Specifically, it processes untrusted URLs for OAuth-related discovery and metadata without verifying if the targets are malicious or internal to the network.

This only affects installations with Dynamic Client Registration (DCR) enabled:

```properties
spring.ai.mcp.client.authorization.dynamic-client-registration.enabled=true
```

DCR does not validate URLs exposed by MCP Servers (protected resource metadata URL, authorization server URL) and Authorization Servers (all OAuth2 endpoints).

### Workaround

When users need to perform DCR, they may provide their own `McpOAuth2ClientManager`. Both `McpMetadataDiscoveryService` and `DynamicClientRegistrationService` are also affected, if used, users should provide their own subclasses.

Alternatively, users can provide the default implementations of these classes with a `RestClient` that implements URL filtering through `ClientHttpRequestInterceptor`.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00198, "percentile": 0.0964}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qjp4-4jvr-xqg3", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-18T13:29:29Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qjp4-4jvr-xqg3", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qjp4-4jvr-xqg3"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45609"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-29T15:16:23Z", "published_at": "2026-05-18T13:29:29Z", "references": ["https://github.com/spring-ai-community/mcp-security/security/advisories/GHSA-qjp4-4jvr-xqg3", "https://github.com/spring-ai-community/mcp-security/pull/68", "https://github.com/spring-ai-community/mcp-security/commit/e6b67d8a67cd7acbee6e4c0741c385d62e3ed576", "https://github.com/spring-ai-community/mcp-security/releases/tag/v0.1.9", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45609", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qjp4-4jvr-xqg3"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/spring-ai-community/mcp-security/security-advisories/GHSA-qjp4-4jvr-xqg3", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/spring-ai-community/mcp-security", "summary": "Spring AI MCP Security: Unvalidated URL Fetching (SSRF)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T10:29:29Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qjp4-4jvr-xqg3", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.1.9", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.springaicommunity:mcp-client-security"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.1.9"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Spring AI MCP Security: Unvalidated URL Fetching (SSRF)
